productDisplayName: ADIDAS Originals Men Superstar 11 White Casual Shoes
description: Introduced in the 1970s as the first low top Basketball shoe by adidas, the Superstar 2 has a come a long journey without losing its touch on the hearts of millions across the world. With a stylish design and silhouette, the Superstar easily transitioned from a basketball shoe to  youth fashion culture, and is today part of the adidas originals collection as the Superstar 2. UpperTextile upper with adidas patented 3-Stripes on the sides of the midfootRidged and grooved toe capLacing system for a snug, customised FitPadded collar and tongue for breathable comfort and optimum fitPadded footbed for all-day comfortMidsoleMoulded EVA midsole with colourful detailing for vintage style and impact protectionOutsoleTPR outsole with herringbone grooves for absolute durability, grip and tractionShoe careWipe surface using a dry, clean clothDo not store in direct sunlight
